message:
fix(deps): remove zfogg/dolt fork replace directive

The fork's nil-pointer checks mask a caller-side bug rather than fixing
a Dolt issue (per Dolt team feedback on dolthub/dolt#10539). Gastown
doesn't directly depend on dolthub/dolt — it goes through beads.

Removing the replace directive unblocks `go install` for users (#2230).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -132,5 +132,3 @@ require (
 	google.golang.org/protobuf v1.36.11 // indirect
 	gopkg.in/yaml.v3 v3.0.1 // indirect
 )
-
-replace github.com/dolthub/dolt/go => github.com/zfogg/dolt/go v0.40.5-0.20260220031545-86d23ffebae2
